description_long: This object is a retro-styled, cube-shaped television with a matte black exterior and a prominent front-facing screen. The front panel features a digital display with green text reading 'WAKE UP NEO', and below the screen are five rotary knobs and a rectangular button, suggesting manual controls. The top of the unit has a recessed handle for portability, and the brand 'THE MATRIX' is subtly inscribed. The back panel is vented for cooling and includes a set of switches and a power cord, while the right side is plain. The left side displays an image of two hands holding a red and blue pill, referencing a famous scene from The Matrix film.
description: A black, cube-shaped retro television with manual controls, a digital display, and Matrix-themed branding and imagery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen with green text, five rotary knobs, a button, and the power indicator.
description_view_1: Right side view, plain matte black surface with the power cord visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with ventilation slits, a set of switches, and the power cord connection.
description_view_3: Left side view featuring an image of hands holding red and blue pills, referencing The Matrix.
attribute_bezel_design: thick, matte black plastic bezel with a retro boxy style
attribute_control_button_layout: row of five rotary knobs and a button on the front lower edge
